en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: FOR THE FLUTES. A PSALM OF DAVID. Give ear to my words, O LORD; consider my groaning.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你留心聽我的話， 顧念我的歎息。

en: Give attention to the sound of my cry, my King and my God, for to you do I pray.
zh: 我的王，我的 神啊！ 求你傾聽我呼求的聲音， 因為我向你禱告。

en: O LORD, in the morning you hear my voice; in the morning I prepare a sacrifice for you and watch.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你在清晨聽我的聲音； 我要一早向你陳明， 並且迫切等候。

en: For you are not a God who delights in wickedness; evil may not dwell with you.
zh: 因為你是不喜愛邪惡的 神， 惡人不能與你同住。

en: The boastful shall not stand before your eyes; you hate all evildoers.
zh: 狂傲的人不能在你眼前站立， 你恨惡所有作惡的人。

en: You destroy those who speak lies; the LORD abhors the bloodthirsty and deceitful man.
zh: 你必滅絕說謊話的； 好流人血和弄詭詐的， 都是耶和華所憎惡的。

en: But I, through the abundance of your steadfast love, will enter your house. I will bow down toward your holy temple in the fear of you.
zh: 至於我，我必憑著你豐盛的慈愛， 進入你的殿； 我要存著敬畏你的心， 向你的聖所敬拜。

en: Lead me, O LORD, in your righteousness because of my enemies; make your way straight before me.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你因我仇敵的緣故， 按著你的公義引導我， 在我面前鋪平你的道路。

en: For there is no truth in their mouth; their inmost self is destruction; their throat is an open grave; they flatter with their tongue.
zh: 因為他們的口裡沒有真話， 他們的內心充滿毀滅人的意圖， 他們的喉嚨是敞開的墳墓， 他們用舌頭弄詭詐。

en: Make them bear their guilt, O God; let them fall by their own counsels; because of the abundance of their transgressions cast them out, for they have rebelled against you.
zh: 神啊！求你定他們的罪； 願他們因自己的詭計跌倒， 願你因他們許多的過犯，把他們趕出去， 因為他們背叛了你。

en: But let all who take refuge in you rejoice; let them ever sing for joy, and spread your protection over them, that those who love your name may exult in you.
zh: 願所有投靠你的人都喜樂， 常常歡呼； 願你保護他們， 又願愛你名的人，因你歡樂。

en: For you bless the righteous, O LORD; you cover him with favor as with a shield.
zh: 耶和華啊！因為你必賜福給義人， 你要以恩惠像盾牌四面護衛他。
